# CANDIDATE: SNIPER_V_PULLBACK_CHART_STOP_OOS

**Filed:** 2026-06-01
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** new_trigger (SNIPER variant)
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-OOS validation complete)

## Hypothesis

V_pullback+chart-stop captures SNIPER entries at pullbacks to broken levels with tighter stop (chart-stop at level) vs baseline premium-stop. The combo was validated on small-N anchor window; full OOS across 2026-01..2026-04 determines if edge holds.

## Mechanism

- **Entry:** Price pulls back to within $0.30 of broken SNIPER level, closes back through level in prior direction
- **Stop:** Chart-stop at level ± $0.50 (tight vs baseline -8% premium)
- **Target:** TP1 at +30% premium OR first chart level, runner rides ribbon

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | Engine took 710P | V_pullback may have fired at pullback to broken 715 level | TBD — requires backtest |
| 5/01 winner | Engine took 721P | V_pullback may have fired | TBD |
| 5/04 winner | Engine took 721P | V_pullback may have fired | TBD |
| 5/05 loser | Engine took 722P (lost) | V_pullback likely skips (no pullback to broken level) | TBD |
| 5/06 loser | Engine took 730P (lost) | V_pullback likely skips | TBD |
| 5/07 loser 1 | Engine took 734C (lost) | V_pullback likely skips | TBD |
| 5/07 loser 2 | Engine took 737C (lost) | V_pullback likely skips | TBD |

**Note:** V_pullback is designed to be MORE SELECTIVE than baseline — it skips chop days, captures trending moves. Expected: higher WR but fewer signals.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** Per-contract comparison; assumes $25K+ for full qty
2. **Sample bias:** Small-N anchor validation (N~7 days) — may not generalize; full OOS N~80 days
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (2026-01..2026-04 validation in progress)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (simulated only, no OPRA validation yet)
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Missed-move cost: if V_pullback filters too aggressively, baseline captures wins it misses
   - OOS WR may regress from small-N validation
   - Chart-stop may exit before premium-stop would recover
6. **Concentration:** Unknown until OOS complete — will report top-5 day %

## Pre-merge gate

- [ ] OOS run complete across 2026-01..2026-04
- [ ] Days-green fraction ≥ 55%
- [ ] Missed-move cost ≤ 20% of baseline winners
- [ ] Per-contract P&L > baseline premium-stop
- [ ] Gym validation passes
- [ ] Real-fills check on top 3 J days

## Confidence

3 / 10 — Cannot assess until OOS run completes. Small-N validation showed promise but full OOS is required.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Does not conflict with existing SNIPER candidates (#13-15). Those use VIX filtering; this uses pullback+chart-stop entry refinement. Complementary if OOS confirms.
